name: Greenfield Vertical Slices
prompt: Break this reviewed architecture and API contract into implementation-ready tasks for a first-release approvals workflow. Architecture: We are building a new document approval system. There is a Document service, an Approval service, and a Notification service. API Contract: POST /documents (create), POST /approvals (approve/reject), GET /documents/{id}/approvals (status). We need to build this from scratch and ship the first version.
assertions: tasks are small enough to complete in 1-3 days
slices remain vertical rather than backend-first chunks
no orphan tasks appear without upstream rationale

name: Brownfield Increment Plan
prompt: Break this brownfield modernization design into reversible increments that preserve release boundaries and rollback safety. Architecture: We are migrating from a legacy monolith access-review system to a new microservice. The legacy system writes directly to the DB. The new system will use an event-driven approach. API Contract: We need to dual-write for a while and eventually switch reads.
assertions: tasks preserve coexistence and rollback constraints
characterization / regression safety work appears before behavioral changes
migration tasks do not imply a big-bang cutover
